echo-test.description: Safe builtin echo runner for preview/execute smoke tests

fake-validator.description: Local fake validator (scripts/fake_agent.py) — adjust path for your repo

cursor-local.description: User-configured local CLI. Fill argv with your trusted command; Governor does not ship Cursor CLI syntax.

chatbang-local.description: Chatbang — verify stdin/prompt contract locally before enabling.

claude-local.description: Claude Code -p (prompt on stdin). Enable only when auth works; no secrets in argv.
